description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bindgen that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: rustfmt, msrv, quickchecking, test-expectations, test, and test-book. Each job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, and installs the required Rust toolchain. The jobs perform various tasks such as running rustfmt, building with the minimum supported Rust version, building quickcheck tests, testing expectations, running comprehensive tests with different configurations, and testing the book.
